languages.text: {n}Вскоре в корневой системе Заркова выросли целые пласталевые и адамантиновые бастионы. Но направлены эти оборонные рубежи были не вовне, а вовнутрь. Бои были кровавыми и яростными, но, несмотря на потери, Погонщицы были почти полностью истреблены.{/n}

{n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вскоре в корневой системе Заркова выросли целые пласталевые и адамантиновые бастионы. Но направлены эти оборонные рубежи были не вовне, а вовнутрь. Бои были кровавыми и яростными, но, несмотря на потери, Погонщицы были почти полностью истреблены.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

{n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

{n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ザルコフの根系に、すぐにプラステールとアダムタイトの要塞が築かれた。しかし、その防御の境界は外に向けられたのではなく、内側に向けられていた。戦いは激しく、多くの犠牲者が出たが、それでもドレーバーはほぼ完全に消滅した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの根系に、すぐにプラステールとアダムタイトの要塞が築かれた。しかし、その防御の境界は外に向けられたのではなく、内側に向けられていた。戦いは激しく、多くの犠牲者が出たが、それでもドレーバーはほぼ完全に消滅した。

languages.text: {n}Pronto surgieron baluartes enteros de plastiacero y adamantino en el sistema de raíces de Zarkov, pero las fortificaciones estaban orientadas al interior, no al exterior. Las batallas fueron sangrientas, pero a pesar de las numerosas bajas que infligieron, los Pastores fueron exterminados casi por completo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pronto surgieron baluartes enteros de plastiacero y adamantino en el sistema de raíces de Zarkov, pero las fortificaciones estaban orientadas al interior, no al exterior. Las batallas fueron sangrientas, pero a pesar de las numerosas bajas que infligieron, los Pastores fueron exterminados casi por completo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}很快，一座座塑钢与精金构筑的堡垒在扎尔科夫的根系间拔地而起。但这些防线并非对外，而是向内收紧。战斗血腥惨烈，伤亡代价惨重，但拒生花已几乎被铲除殆尽。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}很快，一座座塑钢与精金构筑的堡垒在扎尔科夫的根系间拔地而起。但这些防线并非对外，而是向内收紧。战斗血腥惨烈，伤亡代价惨重，但拒生花已几乎被铲除殆尽。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Wenig später entstanden im Kernsystem von Zarkov ganze Bastionen aus Plaststahl und Adamant, aber diese Schutzwälle richteten sich nicht nach außen, sondern nach innen. Die Kämpfe waren blutig und brutal, aber die Treiber wurden unter hohen Verlusten fast vollständig ausgelöscht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Wenig später entstanden im Kernsystem von Zarkov ganze Bastionen aus Plaststahl und Adamant, aber diese Schutzwälle richteten sich nicht nach außen, sondern nach innen. Die Kämpfe waren blutig und brutal, aber die Treiber wurden unter hohen Verlusten fast vollständig ausgelöscht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kısa süre sonra Zarkov'un kök sisteminde plasçelik ve adamantinden yapılmış koca burçlar yükseldi ancak bu savunma hatları dışa değil, içe dönüktü. Savaşlar kanlı ve şiddetliydi ancak kayıplara rağmen Çobanlar neredeyse tamamen yok edildi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kısa süre sonra Zarkov'un kök sisteminde plasçelik ve adamantinden yapılmış koca burçlar yükseldi ancak bu savunma hatları dışa değil, içe dönüktü. Savaşlar kanlı ve şiddetliydi ancak kayıplara rağmen Çobanlar neredeyse tamamen yok edildi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Des bastions entiers de plastacier et d'adamantine apparurent bientôt dans tout le système radiculaire de Zarkov. Toutefois, ces structures défensives étaient tournées vers l'intérieur, plutôt que l'extérieur. Les combats furent acharnés et sanglants, et au prix de nombreuses pertes humaines, les Chasseurs furent presque tous annihilés.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Des bastions entiers de plastacier et d'adamantine apparurent bientôt dans tout le système radiculaire de Zarkov. Toutefois, ces structures défensives étaient tournées vers l'intérieur, plutôt que l'extérieur. Les combats furent acharnés et sanglants, et au prix de nombreuses pertes humaines, les Chasseurs furent presque tous annihilés.{/n}
